perf_hint: every ribbon reads the spectrum once per pixel, so frame time scales with `ribbon_count` — on software rendering keep it at 5 or below, and preview with `--sample 10s` before committing to 1080p

params.name: ribbon_count
params.description: How many ribbons are stacked across the frame.

params.name: amplitude
params.description: How far a loud band displaces the ribbon that reads it.

params.name: thickness
params.description: How wide a ribbon's lit core is, as a fraction of the short edge.

params.name: glow
params.description: How far the halo around each ribbon reaches into the frame.

params.name: spread
params.description: How far apart the ribbons rest before the music moves them.

params.name: drift_speed
params.description: How fast the ribbons travel when nothing is playing.

params.name: blur
params.description: How many spectrum buckets are averaged into each ribbon sample.

params.name: vignette
params.description: How far the corners of the frame fall off.

params.name: brightness
params.description: How much light the loudness of the song puts into the ribbons.
